# Extras

Tests for optional dependency extras in dependency resolution.

## Basic extras

### Extra from pyproject.toml

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_extra -->

Resolve a package from an extra defined in a `pyproject.toml` file.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=42"]

[project]
name = "project"
version = "0.1.0"
dependencies = []
optional-dependencies.foo = [
    "anyio==3.7.0",
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml --extra foo
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile pyproject.toml --extra foo
anyio==3.7.0
    # via project (pyproject.toml)
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

### Extra name normalization

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_extra_name_normalization -->

Extra names are normalized, so non-standard names work.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=42"]

[project]
name = "project"
version = "0.1.0"
dependencies = []
optional-dependencies."FrIeNdLy-._.-bArD" = [
    "anyio==3.7.0",
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml --extra FRiENDlY-...-_-BARd
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile pyproject.toml --extra FRiENDlY-...-_-BARd
anyio==3.7.0
    # via project (pyproject.toml)
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
```

### All extras

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_all_extras -->

Resolve packages from all extras in a `pyproject.toml` file using `--all-extras`.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=42"]

[project]
name = "project"
version = "0.1.0"
dependencies = ["anyio==3.7.0"]
optional-dependencies.foo = [
    "iniconfig==1.1.1",
]
optional-dependencies.bar = [
    "httpcore==0.18.0",
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml --all-extras
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile pyproject.toml --all-extras
anyio==3.7.0
    # via
    #   project (pyproject.toml)
    #   httpcore
certifi==2024.2.2
    # via httpcore
h11==0.14.0
    # via httpcore
httpcore==0.18.0
    # via project (pyproject.toml)
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
iniconfig==1.1.1
    # via project (pyproject.toml)
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via
    #   anyio
    #   httpcore

----- stderr -----
Resolved 7 packages in [TIME]
```

## Missing and invalid extras

### Missing extra error

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_extra_missing -->

Request an extra that does not exist in a `pyproject.toml` file.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=42"]

[project]
name = "project"
version = "0.1.0"
dependencies = []
optional-dependencies.foo = [
    "anyio==3.7.0",
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml --extra bar
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: Requested extra not found: bar
```

### Multiple missing extras error

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_extras_missing -->

Request multiple extras that do not exist.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=42"]

[project]
name = "project"
version = "0.1.0"
dependencies = []
optional-dependencies.foo = [
    "anyio==3.7.0",
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml --extra foo --extra bar --extra foobar
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: Requested extras not found: bar, foobar
```

### Extras require pyproject.toml

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_requirements_file_extra -->

Request extras when using a `requirements.in` file which does not support extras.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio==3.7.0
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --all-extras
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: Requesting extras requires a `pyproject.toml`, `setup.cfg`, or `setup.py` file.
```

### Invalid extra name

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::invalid_extra_name -->

Request an extra with a name that does not conform to the specification.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=42"]

[project]
name = "project"
dependencies = []
optional-dependencies.foo = [
    "anyio==3.7.0",
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml --extra "invalid name!"
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: invalid value 'invalid name!' for '--extra <EXTRA>': Extra names must start and end with a letter or digit and may only contain -, _, ., and alphanumeric characters

For more information, try '--help'.
```

### Cannot use both extra and all-extras

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_does_not_allow_both_extra_and_all_extras -->

Using `--extra` and `--all-extras` together is an error.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=42"]

[project]
name = "project"
dependencies = ["anyio==3.7.0"]
optional-dependencies.foo = [
    "iniconfig==1.1.1",
]
optional-dependencies.bar = [
    "httpcore==0.18.0",
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml --all-extras --extra foo
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: the argument '--all-extras' cannot be used with '--extra <EXTRA>'

Usage: uv pip compile --all-extras --exclude-newer <EXCLUDE_NEWER> <SRC_FILE|--group <GROUP>>

For more information, try '--help'.
```

## Missing extras warnings

### Missing registry extra

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::missing_registry_extra -->

Request an extra that doesn't exist on a registry package - warning but success.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
black[tensorboard]==23.10.1
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in
black==23.10.1
    # via -r requirements.in
click==8.1.7
    # via black
mypy-extensions==1.0.0
    # via black
packaging==24.0
    # via black
pathspec==0.12.1
    # via black
platformdirs==4.2.0
    # via black

----- stderr -----
Resolved 6 packages in [TIME]
warning: The package `black==23.10.1` does not have an extra named `tensorboard`
```

### Missing URL extra

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::missing_url_extra -->

Request an extra that doesn't exist on a URL package - warning but success.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
flask[tensorboard] @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/36/42/015c23096649b908c809c69388a805a571a3bea44362fe87e33fc3afa01f/flask-3.0.0-py3-none-any.whl
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in
blinker==1.7.0
    # via flask
click==8.1.7
    # via flask
flask @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/36/42/015c23096649b908c809c69388a805a571a3bea44362fe87e33fc3afa01f/flask-3.0.0-py3-none-any.whl
    # via -r requirements.in
itsdangerous==2.1.2
    # via flask
jinja2==3.1.3
    # via flask
markupsafe==2.1.5
    # via
    #   jinja2
    #   werkzeug
werkzeug==3.0.1
    # via flask

----- stderr -----
Resolved 7 packages in [TIME]
warning: The package `flask @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/36/42/015c23096649b908c809c69388a805a571a3bea44362fe87e33fc3afa01f/flask-3.0.0-py3-none-any.whl` does not have an extra named `tensorboard`
```

## Recursive extras

### Recursive extra

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_recursive_extra -->

Resolve from a `pyproject.toml` file with a recursive extra (extra references own package).

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[project]
name = "project"
version = "0.0.1"
dependencies = [
    "anyio"
]

[project.optional-dependencies]
test = [
    "iniconfig",
]
dev = [
    "project[test]",
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml --extra dev
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile pyproject.toml --extra dev
anyio==4.3.0
    # via project (pyproject.toml)
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
iniconfig==2.0.0
    # via project (pyproject.toml)
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 4 packages in [TIME]
```

### Mutually recursive extras

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_mutually_recursive_extra -->

Resolve from a `pyproject.toml` file with mutually recursive extras.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[project]
name = "project"
version = "0.0.1"
dependencies = [
    "anyio"
]

[project.optional-dependencies]
test = [
    "iniconfig",
    "project[dev]"
]
dev = [
    "project[test]",
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml --extra dev
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile pyproject.toml --extra dev
anyio==4.3.0
    # via project (pyproject.toml)
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
iniconfig==2.0.0
    # via project (pyproject.toml)
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 4 packages in [TIME]
```

### Recursive extra with marker

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_recursive_extra_marker -->

Resolve from a `pyproject.toml` file with a recursive extra that has a marker attached.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[project]
name = "project"
version = "0.0.1"
dependencies = [
    "anyio"
]

[project.optional-dependencies]
test = [
    "iniconfig",
]
dev = [
    "project[test] ; sys_platform == 'darwin'",
]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml --extra dev --universal
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile pyproject.toml --extra dev --universal
anyio==4.3.0
    # via project (pyproject.toml)
idna==3.6
    # via anyio
iniconfig==2.0.0 ; sys_platform == 'darwin'
    # via project (pyproject.toml)
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via anyio

----- stderr -----
Resolved 4 packages in [TIME]
```

### Deeply recursive extras

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_pyproject_toml_deeply_recursive_extra -->

Resolve from a `pyproject.toml` file with multiple levels of recursive extras.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[project]
name = "project"
version = "0.0.1"
dependencies = []

[project.optional-dependencies]
foo = ["iniconfig"]
bar = ["project[foo]"]
baz = ["project[bar]"]
bop = ["project[bar] ; sys_platform == 'darwin'"]
qux = ["project[bop] ; python_version == '3.12'"]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile pyproject.toml --universal --extra qux
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile pyproject.toml --universal --extra qux
iniconfig==2.0.0 ; python_full_version < '3.13' and sys_platform == 'darwin'
    # via project (pyproject.toml)

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

<!--
Note: The recursive_extras_direct_url test cannot be migrated because it requires
local path references in requirements files, and mdtest does not support variable
substitution in file content.
-->

## No strip extras

### Preserve extra in output

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::no_strip_extra -->

Use `--no-strip-extras` to keep the extra annotation in the output.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
flask[dotenv]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --no-strip-extras
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --no-strip-extras
blinker==1.7.0
    # via flask
click==8.1.7
    # via flask
flask[dotenv]==3.0.2
    # via -r requirements.in
itsdangerous==2.1.2
    # via flask
jinja2==3.1.3
    # via flask
markupsafe==2.1.5
    # via
    #   jinja2
    #   werkzeug
python-dotenv==1.0.1
    # via flask
werkzeug==3.0.1
    # via flask

----- stderr -----
Resolved 8 packages in [TIME]
```

### Preserve multiple extras

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::no_strip_extras -->

```toml
[test]
[environment]
target-family = "unix"
```

Use `--no-strip-extras` with multiple extras on the same package.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
anyio[trio]
anyio[doc]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --no-strip-extras
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --no-strip-extras
alabaster==0.7.16
    # via sphinx
anyio[doc, trio]==4.3.0
    # via -r requirements.in
attrs==23.2.0
    # via
    #   outcome
    #   trio
babel==2.14.0
    # via sphinx
certifi==2024.2.2
    # via requests
charset-normalizer==3.3.2
    # via requests
docutils==0.20.1
    # via
    #   sphinx
    #   sphinx-rtd-theme
idna==3.6
    # via
    #   anyio
    #   requests
    #   trio
imagesize==1.4.1
    # via sphinx
jinja2==3.1.3
    # via sphinx
markupsafe==2.1.5
    # via jinja2
outcome==1.3.0.post0
    # via trio
packaging==24.0
    # via
    #   anyio
    #   sphinx
pygments==2.17.2
    # via sphinx
requests==2.31.0
    # via sphinx
sniffio==1.3.1
    # via
    #   anyio
    #   trio
snowballstemmer==2.2.0
    # via sphinx
sortedcontainers==2.4.0
    # via trio
sphinx==7.2.6
    # via
    #   anyio
    #   sphinx-autodoc-typehints
    #   sphinx-rtd-theme
    #   sphinxcontrib-jquery
sphinx-autodoc-typehints==2.0.0
    # via anyio
sphinx-rtd-theme==2.0.0
    # via anyio
sphinxcontrib-applehelp==1.0.8
    # via sphinx
sphinxcontrib-devhelp==1.0.6
    # via sphinx
sphinxcontrib-htmlhelp==2.0.5
    # via sphinx
sphinxcontrib-jquery==4.1
    # via sphinx-rtd-theme
sphinxcontrib-jsmath==1.0.1
    # via sphinx
sphinxcontrib-qthelp==1.0.7
    # via sphinx
sphinxcontrib-serializinghtml==1.1.10
    # via sphinx
trio==0.25.0
    # via anyio
urllib3==2.2.1
    # via requests

----- stderr -----
Resolved 30 packages in [TIME]
```

## Universal resolution extras

### Disjoint extras

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::universal_disjoint_extra -->

Universal resolution with disjoint extras on different platforms.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
flask[async]; sys_platform == 'linux'
flask[dotenv]; sys_platform == 'darwin'
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --universal
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --universal
asgiref==3.8.1 ; sys_platform == 'linux'
    # via flask
blinker==1.7.0 ; sys_platform == 'darwin' or sys_platform == 'linux'
    # via flask
click==8.1.7 ; sys_platform == 'darwin' or sys_platform == 'linux'
    # via flask
flask==3.0.2 ; sys_platform == 'darwin' or sys_platform == 'linux'
    # via -r requirements.in
itsdangerous==2.1.2 ; sys_platform == 'darwin' or sys_platform == 'linux'
    # via flask
jinja2==3.1.3 ; sys_platform == 'darwin' or sys_platform == 'linux'
    # via flask
markupsafe==2.1.5 ; sys_platform == 'darwin' or sys_platform == 'linux'
    # via
    #   jinja2
    #   werkzeug
python-dotenv==1.0.1 ; sys_platform == 'darwin'
    # via flask
werkzeug==3.0.1 ; sys_platform == 'darwin' or sys_platform == 'linux'
    # via flask

----- stderr -----
Resolved 9 packages in [TIME]
```

### Disjoint extras with no-strip

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::universal_disjoint_extra_no_strip -->

Universal resolution with disjoint extras and `--no-strip-extras`.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
flask[async]; sys_platform == 'linux'
flask[dotenv]; sys_platform == 'darwin'
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --universal --no-strip-extras
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --universal --no-strip-extras
asgiref==3.8.1 ; sys_platform == 'linux'
    # via flask
blinker==1.7.0 ; sys_platform == 'darwin' or sys_platform == 'linux'
    # via flask
click==8.1.7 ; sys_platform == 'darwin' or sys_platform == 'linux'
    # via flask
flask==3.0.2 ; sys_platform == 'darwin' or sys_platform == 'linux'
    # via -r requirements.in
flask[async]==3.0.2 ; sys_platform == 'linux'
    # via -r requirements.in
flask[dotenv]==3.0.2 ; sys_platform == 'darwin'
    # via -r requirements.in
itsdangerous==2.1.2 ; sys_platform == 'darwin' or sys_platform == 'linux'
    # via flask
jinja2==3.1.3 ; sys_platform == 'darwin' or sys_platform == 'linux'
    # via flask
markupsafe==2.1.5 ; sys_platform == 'darwin' or sys_platform == 'linux'
    # via
    #   jinja2
    #   werkzeug
python-dotenv==1.0.1 ; sys_platform == 'darwin'
    # via flask
werkzeug==3.0.1 ; sys_platform == 'darwin' or sys_platform == 'linux'
    # via flask

----- stderr -----
Resolved 9 packages in [TIME]
```

### Overlapping extra with base

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::universal_overlap_extra_base -->

Universal resolution with extra that overlaps with base package.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
flask
flask[dotenv]; sys_platform == 'darwin'
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --universal
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --universal
blinker==1.7.0
    # via flask
click==8.1.7
    # via flask
colorama==0.4.6 ; sys_platform == 'win32'
    # via click
flask==3.0.2
    # via -r requirements.in
itsdangerous==2.1.2
    # via flask
jinja2==3.1.3
    # via flask
markupsafe==2.1.5
    # via
    #   jinja2
    #   werkzeug
python-dotenv==1.0.1 ; sys_platform == 'darwin'
    # via flask
werkzeug==3.0.1
    # via flask

----- stderr -----
Resolved 9 packages in [TIME]
```

## Install with extras

### Install extras requires pyproject.toml

<!-- from pip_install.rs::install_extras -->

Using `--all-extras` requires a pyproject.toml file for pip install.

```toml
# file: requirements.txt
anyio==3.7.0
```

```console
$ uv pip install --all-extras -r requirements.txt
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: Requesting extras requires a `pylock.toml`, `pyproject.toml`, `setup.cfg`, or `setup.py` file. Use `package[extra]` syntax instead.
```

### Install extras from pyproject.toml

<!-- from pip_install.rs::install_extras (variant 2) -->

Using `--all-extras` with a pyproject.toml file works.

```toml
# file: pyproject.toml
[project]
name = "project"
version = "0.1.0"
dependencies = ["anyio==3.7.0"]
```

```console
$ uv pip install --all-extras -r pyproject.toml
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
Resolved 3 packages in [TIME]
Prepared 3 packages in [TIME]
Installed 3 packages in [TIME]
 + anyio==3.7.0
 + idna==3.6
 + sniffio==1.3.1
```

## No-deps with extras

### Valid extra with no-deps

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::no_deps_valid_extra -->

Resolve a package with `--no-deps`, including a valid extra.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
flask[dotenv]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --no-deps
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --no-deps
flask==3.0.2
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

### Invalid extra with no-deps

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::no_deps_invalid_extra -->

Resolve a package with `--no-deps`, including an invalid extra. No warning is emitted in this mode.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
flask[empty]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --no-deps
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --no-deps
flask==3.0.2
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

## Extra edge cases

### Package with extra that has no dependencies

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_none_extra -->

Resolving a package that has an extra defined but the extra has no actual dependencies.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
entrypoints==0.3
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in
entrypoints==0.3
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

### No-strip-extras preserves extra in output

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::no_strip_extra -->

Resolve a package with `--no-strip-extras` to preserve the extra in the output.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
flask[dotenv]
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in --no-strip-extras
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in --no-strip-extras
blinker==1.7.0
    # via flask
click==8.1.7
    # via flask
flask[dotenv]==3.0.2
    # via -r requirements.in
itsdangerous==2.1.2
    # via flask
jinja2==3.1.3
    # via flask
markupsafe==2.1.5
    # via
    #   jinja2
    #   werkzeug
```
